step1_reachability.yfinance KRW=X: HTTP 429 from recorder/GHA IP — NOT used (yfinance KR FX blocked, same failure mode as US yfinance adapter)
step1_reachability.stooq usdkrw: HTTP 200, usable close — PRIMARY 원/달러 source
step1_reachability.stooq ^kospi: HTTP 200, usable close — Stooq KOSPI tier
step1_reachability.stooq ^kosdaq: N/D placeholder for every symbol variant probed — Stooq does NOT carry KOSDAQ; Yonhap parse is the only non-KRX KOSDAQ tier
step1_reachability.yonhap market.xml: HTTP 200 with a browser/Investo UA; numeric index-close headline is best-effort (not always present)

kosdaq.csv.note: Stooq N/D placeholder — adapter must skip and defer KOSDAQ to the Yonhap tier

yonhap_index.xml.note: Synthetic Yonhap RSS carrying KOSPI + KOSDAQ numeric close headlines for the numeric-parse fallback test; shape mirrors the live yna.co.kr/rss/market.xml feed
